items.title: Will Rising Costs Hit Molina's Q4 Earnings? Key Insights Here
items.description: MOH heads into Q4 earnings with EPS seen plunging 92.5% year over year as costs rise, even as revenues and premiums are projected to grow.

items.title: Amazon To Rally Around 32%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Price Target Cut by $30 at Wells Fargo
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is included among the 7 Best Non-REIT Dividend Stocks to Invest in. UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) operates across multiple healthcare and services platforms. Its business includes Optum Health, Optum Insight, Optum Rx, and UnitedHealthcare, with coverage spanning employer plans, Medicare and retirement offerings, and government-sponsored programs. items.title: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on UnitedHealth Group, Lowers Price Target to $370
items.description: Truist Securities  analyst David Macdonald   maintains UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $410 to $370.

items.title: Mark Cuban Says Berkshire Should Reconsider Insurance Bets: 'I Hate To Say This'
items.description: Mark Cuban reiterated his criticism on the practices of major insurance companies, urging investors to reconsider their insurance investments.
